violations.description: IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensils for ice noted stored in an unprotected location. Ice scoop holder has debris build up coming in contact with the food contact end of the scoop.

inspections.comments: The front handwash sink near coffee area has a supply of soap but the dispenser is underneith the sink inside of the cabinet I would suggest relocating the dispenser to a more accessable location perhaps on the wall next to the sink.

violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food dispensing and in the rear storage area. 1) The rear storage area near 3 compartment sink is out of paper towels. 2) The front food dispensing sink near coffee area is out of paper towels.
